entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the primary crop studied for disease prevalence

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola affecting pearl millet

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: ICMV 221
entities.description: An improved, resistant variety of pearl millet developed by ICRISAT

entities.name: ERITREA
entities.description: The country where the systematic survey of downy mildew was conducted

entities.name: KEREN
entities.description: A subzone in Eritrea where downy mildew incidence was 40-78%

entities.name: MOGOLO
entities.description: A subzone in Eritrea where downy mildew incidence was less than 1%

entities.name: DGHE
entities.description: A subzone in Eritrea where downy mildew incidence was less than 1%

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC SURVEY
entities.description: The research method used to assess the prevalence and severity of downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW INCIDENCE
entities.description: The ratio of diseased to total plants in a given area, expressed as a percentage

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen to cause disease, assessed via leaf samples

entities.name: TOTAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The cumulative amount of rainfall from sowing to the soft dough stage

entities.name: NUMBER OF RAINY DAYS
entities.description: The total count of days with rain from sowing to the soft dough stage

entities.name: PATHOGEN VIRULENCE
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity of the pathogen within a region

entities.name: ROTATIONAL CROPPING SEQUENCE
entities.description: The practice of alternating crops in a field to manage disease
